rulings.Case Title: BRAIN RESEARCH LABS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al VS. TOM CLARKE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 16, 2009, line 11, Plaintiff's Temporary Restraining Order and order to show cause regarding preliminary injunction. Motion for preliminary injunction denied. Plaintiff fails to show inadequate remedy at law, imminent irreparable harm. Evidence of lost customers is speculative and conclusory. Video was discovered in mid-August and restraining order sought in late September. Plaintiff fails to show a probability of success on its claims, thirty day study not sufficient to demonstrate falsity of statements. Mandatory injunction is an extraordinary remedy. This ruling is without prejudice to parties seeking appropriate orders and remedies from the Marin County Superior Court where the class action is pending. =(302/CWW)
